description_md: cast-level metadata for CalCOFI CTD profiles; measurements pivoted to ctd_measurement
PK: deterministic UUID v5 from (cruise_key, cast_key, cast_dir, datetime_start_utc)
UTC timestamp parsed from date_time_utc string
point geometry (WGS84) from latitude and longitude
cruise identifier in YYMMKK format; last 2 chars encode ship
data processing stage: final or preliminary
CalCOFI grid cell identifier from spatial join
provenance: path to source CSV within download archive
cast identifier from source CSV (Cast_ID); composed of Study + Ord_Occ + up/downcast code
cast direction: D=downcast (start time and start lat/lon) or U=upcast (time and lat/lon at first bottle tripped)
order in which the station was occupied during the cruise (CalCOFI Ord_Occ)
CTD-at-Depth event number from source CSV
GPS decimal latitude; downcast = start latitude, upcast = latitude at first bottle tripped (CalCOFI Lat_Dec)
GPS decimal longitude; downcast = start longitude, upcast = longitude at first bottle tripped (CalCOFI Lon_Dec)
CalCOFI Line and Station composite key in the form "LLL.L SSS.S" (renamed from Sta_ID)
long-format sensor readings pivoted from wide CTD profile data
PK: deterministic UUID v5 from (ctd_cast_uuid, depth_m, measurement_type)

adaptively-thinned ctd_measurement: single cast direction, canonical measurement types, ~10 m depth grid with inflection points preserved (see Measurement Frequency section); headline table — full ctd_measurement is supplemental
PK: deterministic UUID v5 from (ctd_cast_uuid, depth_m, measurement_type)
measurement type key; canonical types only (FK to measurement_type.measurement_type where is_canonical)
numeric measurement value (exact copy from ctd_measurement; thinning selects rows, never interpolates)
single retained direction per physical cast: D (downcast, preferred) or U (upcast, fallback)
why this depth was kept: grid (on the ~10 m grid) or inflection (RDP-retained between grid nodes)
summary statistics per station/depth/measurement_type across cast directions
PK: deterministic UUID v5 from (cruise_key, site_key, depth_m, measurement_type)
mean measurement value across cast directions
reference table for CTD measurement types with units and descriptions
provenance: semicolon-delimited list of datasets that produce this measurement type
provenance: wide-format DuckDB table the measurement was pivoted from
provenance: precision column name in source wide-format table (blank if none)
original column name in wide-format CTD CSV
provenance: quality flag column name in source wide-format table (blank if none)
convenience VIEW that adds back temporal columns derivable from ctd_cast
cruise identifier in YYYY-MM-NODC format; hive partition key
TRUE for canonical measurement types kept in ctd_thin and ctd_summary

wide-format CTD profile — one column per measurement type (supplemental output for ERDDAP; not part of normalized release). Column definitions follow the CalCOFI CTD+Bottle CSV column format (Sep 2015).
data processing stage: final or preliminary
cast direction: D=downcast (start time, start lat/lon) or U=upcast (time, lat/lon at first bottle tripped)
order in which the station was occupied during the cruise (CalCOFI Ord_Occ)
date/time UTC; downcast=start time, upcast=time at first bottle tripped
GPS decimal latitude; downcast=start lat, upcast=lat at first bottle tripped
GPS decimal longitude; downcast=start lon, upcast=lon at first bottle tripped
CalCOFI Line and Station composite key "LLL.L SSS.S" (renamed from Sta_ID)
primary salinity corrected against deep (>350 m) bottle salinities
secondary salinity corrected against deep bottle salinities
primary oxygen corrected using cruise-average regression vs bottle samples
primary oxygen corrected using station-average regression vs bottle samples
secondary oxygen corrected using cruise-average regression
secondary oxygen corrected using station-average regression
primary CTD oxygen in micromoles per kilogram
estimated chlorophyll from cruise-corrected fluorometer regression (0-200 m)
estimated chlorophyll from station-corrected fluorometer regression (0-200 m)
estimated nitrate from cruise-corrected ISUS regression vs bottle samples
estimated nitrate from station-corrected ISUS regression (~20 bottle samples per cast)
potential density anomaly computed from Temp1 and Salt1
potential density anomaly computed from Temp2 and Salt2
oxygen saturation computed from primary sensor
oxygen saturation computed from secondary sensor
depth at which Niskin bottle was tripped
2-char NODC ship code derived from cruise_key
